task.en:
Set up a project workspace and record it.

1. In Finder, inside the Documents folder, create a new folder named exactly `Q4-Launch`. Inside `Q4-Launch`, create THREE subfolders named exactly `Design`, `Engineering`, and `Marketing`.
2. In Notes, create a new note titled exactly `Q4-Launch Folders`. Its body must list the three subfolder names you created, one per line:
```
Design
Engineering
Marketing
```
Do not create any other folders or notes.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; rm -rf "$HOME/Documents/Q4-Launch" 2>/dev/null; UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 2; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: B="$HOME/Documents/Q4-Launch"; n=0; for S in Design Engineering Marketing; do [ -d "$B/$S" ] && n=$((n+1)); done; awk -v n="$n" 'BEGIN{printf "%.4f\n", n/3}'

BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Q4-Launch Folders"' 2>/dev/null); n=0; for S in Design Engineering Marketing; do echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "$S" && n=$((n+1)); done; awk -v n="$n" 'BEGIN{printf "%.4f\n", n/3}'
